narrative:
Pierce Township D (precinct in Clermont County) has 972 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.7 percentage points.
